notes: Solid Pong implementation with proper physics, AI, and audio; minor issue with score text baseline (y:16 cuts off top of digits) and CPU AI only tracks ball moving right which can make it too easy when ball moves left.

Core logic works, but the score text is drawn off-screen (y=16 with 48px font and default baseline), overlay text overlaps with canvas text on the title screen, and the CPU AI tracks the ball with its top edge instead of its center.
A solid and mostly complete Pong implementation, but the mixed title/overlay UI, slightly awkward score text placement, and nontrivial serve/state quirks keep it well short of perfect.
